mission.title: k3s: k3s as RPMs
mission.description: k3s as RPMs. Requested by 15+ users.

steps.title: Check current k3s deployment
steps.description:
Verify your k3s version and configuration:
```bash
k3s --version
kubectl get nodes
```
This feature requires a working k3s installation.

steps.title: Review k3s configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant k3s configuration:
```bash
k3s --version
kubectl get nodes -o wide
kubectl get pods -A
```
At the moment is is not possible to build k3s as an RPM or DEB package. This means I have to use the curl installer to install k3s on my host system.

steps.title: Apply the fix for k3s as RPMs
steps.description:
#### Proposed Changes ####

Currently it is not possible to build k3s from source due to the build scripts mixing the stages of download and build.

#### Types of Changes ####

I would consider this a bugfix as this was possible in the past.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get nodes -o wide
kubectl get pods -A
kubectl get events -A --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "k3s as RPMs" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
#### Proposed Changes ####

Currently it is not possible to build k3s from source due to the build scripts mixing the stages of download and build.

#### Types of Changes ####

I would consider this a bugfix as this was possible in the past.

prerequisites.description: A running k3s cluster or a system where k3s can be installed.
